concept: Collaborator / One on a Mutual Path
description: A person who works jointly on an activity or project with others. They are an active co-creator in a shared process.
rationale: A composition of the established roots 'mo' (mutual, reciprocal) and 'la' (path, flow). The word's structure literally means 'one who is on a mutual path,' defining a collaborator by their shared journey and effort with others. This avoids derivational morphology by building the concept from fundamental roots.
